revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ameihatowakeno Shrine
| native_name = 天石門別神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ameihatowakeno Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.932721|134.204486}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ameihatowakeno Shrine'''|天石門別神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mimasaka Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|San-no-Miya|lt=San-no-Miya|qid=Q134917303|1=San-no-Miya}}
** P1001: {{ill|Mimasaka Province|lt=Mimasaka Province|cs|Provincie Mimasaka|de|Provinz Mimasaka|en|Mimasaka Province|es|Provincia de Mimasaka|fa|ولایت میماساکا|fr|Province de Mimasaka|gl|Provincia de Mimasaka|id|Provinsi Mimasaka|it|Mimasaka (provincia)|ja|美作国|ko|미마사카국|lt|Mimasakos žemė|nl|Mimasaka (provincie)|no|Mimasakaprovinsen|pt|Província de Mimasaka|ru|Мимасака (провинция)|simple|Mimasaka Province|sk|Mimasaka (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мимасака|tr|Mimasaka (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Мімасака|zh_min_nan|Mimasaka-kok|zh|美作國|qid=Q936036|1=Mimasaka Province}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11608745|ltq=Q11608745|qid=Q11608745|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mimasaka Province}}
** Series ordinal: 10
** P155: {{ill|Nakayama Shrine|lt=Nakayama Shrine|arz|ضريح ناكاياما|en|Nakayama Shrine|ja|中山神社|zh|中山神社 (津山市)|qid=Q11364246|1=Nakayama Shrine}}
